data.description: According to Vedomosti, Iran’s envoy in Moscow stated that the security of transit through the Strait of Hormuz is maintained under a defined legal regime.

data.title: Accenture and Avanade Collaborate with Microsoft to Develop Agentic Factory to Help Reduce Manufacturing Downtime
data.description: A new factory intelligence system is being developed by Accenture and Avanade in partnership with Microsoft in HANNOVER, Germany. The system aims to assist companies in revolutionizing their factory operations.

data.title: Shoplazza Launches the World's First AI-Native Commerce Operating System with a Unified Suite of AI Agents
data.description: In a recent announcement on April 20, 2026, in Toronto, Shoplazza, a prominent global commerce platform, introduced the world's pioneer AI native commerce operating system. This launch included a comprehensive set of AI agents intended to operate throughout the complete ecommerce lifecycle. This groundbreaking advancement signifies a remarkable achievement in the field of commerce technology.

data.title: TGS Webcast Details for Q1 2026 Presentation
data.description: In Oslo, Norway on April 20, 2026, TGS, a prominent worldwide supplier of energy information and insights, is set to unveil its first quarter results for 2026 at around 7:00 a.m. CEST on April 30.

data.title: Tallinna Vesi is introducing upgrades to improve the customer experience
data.description: Today, Tallinna Vesi introduced enhancements to enhance customer experience, with a revamped website, upgraded self-service portal, and a fresh visual identity.

data.title: Flow Traders appoints Frank Drouet as CEO Asia-Pacific to support regional expansion
data.description: Flow Traders Ltd. (Euronext: FLOW) has appointed Frank Drouet as the new Chief Executive Officer for Asia-Pacific, based in Amsterdam, the Netherlands. This move is part of the company's strategy to support regional expansion in APAC. Effective immediately, Drouet will lead the APAC operations and also become a member of Flow Traders' Executive Committee.

data.title: Hackers used social engineering to takeover eth.limo domain; company investigating sophisticated attack - EasyDNS CEO.
data.description: Following a social engineering attack, EasyDNS CEO Mark Jeftovic revealed that the breach was intricate and the company is actively looking into the incident to uncover its origins.

data.title: BTC dips below $74K amid US-Iran tension; Iran warns after US seizes Iranian ship; Bitcoin weekend gains erased.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin experienced a sudden drop, falling below $74,000 on Sunday. This decline occurred in response to Iran's warning of retaliatory action following a US military seizure of an Iranian cargo ship.

data.title: SymphonyAI Launches Eight AI Applications Purpose-Built for Energy Asset Reliability and Operational Performance
data.description: SymphonyAI, based in Palo Alto, California, has unveiled eight new industrial AI applications tailored for energy operators. This marks the most significant expansion of IRIS Foundry into the energy sector, offering specialized solutions for challenges such as compressor surge, heat exchanger fouling, and more. Unlike conventional asset management software, these applications are designed to address the unique failure modes, process dynamics, and regulatory requirements in the energy industry. This targeted release demonstrates SymphonyAI's commitment to providing industry-specific AI solutions.
